name: Headless IDA MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with IDA Pro in headless mode for binary analysis and reverse engineering. Enables agents to decompile binaries, analyze disassembly, query function information, extract strings, and perform automated binary analysis tasks through IDA Pro's powerful analysis capabilities.
use_cases: Automated binary decompilation and analysis from malware reverse engineering agents
Querying IDA Pro function signatures and analysis results from DFIR agents
Batch binary analysis and vulnerability research from security research agents
AI-assisted reverse engineering workflows combining IDA Pro with LLM reasoning
not_for: Teams without IDA Pro license (commercial software, expensive)
Unauthorized reverse engineering of proprietary software
General software analysis not requiring binary disassembly
best_when: A security researcher or malware analyst with IDA Pro license wants AI agents to automate binary analysis tasks — accelerating reverse engineering workflows through AI-assisted decompilation and analysis.
avoid_when: You don't have an IDA Pro license. IDA Pro is expensive commercial software. Also: only for authorized reverse engineering — not for circumventing software protections.

auth.notes: No authentication — local IDA Pro integration. IDA Pro license required for the underlying analysis engine.

pricing.paid_tiers: IDA Pro: Starter ($599), Professional ($1,399), full version ($1,899+)
pricing.notes: IDA Pro is expensive commercial software. Headless IDA MCP server is free open source but requires IDA Pro license.

performance.rate_limits: Local — bounded by binary complexity and IDA Pro analysis time

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Binary reverse engineering tools must only analyze authorized binaries
IDA Pro license required — $599-$1,899+ depending on version and features
IDA Pro analysis time varies widely — simple binaries seconds, complex ones hours
Headless mode has limitations vs interactive IDA Pro — some analysis features unavailable
agent_readiness.security_notes: Authorized reverse engineering only. Local binary analysis. Analyzed binaries may contain malware — handle in isolated environments. IDA Pro license required. Do not analyze software beyond authorization.

security_score_components.security_notes: Authorized binary analysis only. Malware isolation required when analyzing suspicious binaries. Local only.
